displayName: Azure Static Web Apps should use a custom domain
description: Audits Azure Static Web Apps that have no custom domain configured. Apps without a custom domain are only reachable via the Microsoft-managed default hostname (*.azurestaticapps.net), which prevents branded endpoints and customer-managed TLS. Applies to both Free and Standard tier. Deny is not supported: customDomains are child resources managed outside the SWA PUT body, so Deny would block all SWA deployments regardless of actual domain state.

metadata.description: Audit logs a compliance warning without blocking; Disabled turns the policy off.
